calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Wan Qing Li was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor Qi Lian Li, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
William Guan was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Elaine Qilian Li.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
